segments.text: Lesson 26.

translations.zh-Hans: 第26课。

segments.text: The Best Art Critics.

translations.zh-Hans: 最佳艺术评论家。

segments.text: First listen, and then answer the question.

translations.zh-Hans: 先听录音，然后回答问题。

segments.text: Who is the student's best critic?

translations.zh-Hans: 谁是这位学生最好的评论家？

segments.text: I am an art student, and I paint a lot of pictures.

translations.zh-Hans: 我是一名学艺术的学生，画了许多画。

segments.text: Many people pretend that they understand modern art.

translations.zh-Hans: 许多人装成很懂现代艺术的样子。

segments.text: They always tell you what a picture is about.

translations.zh-Hans: 他们总要告诉你一幅画表现的是什么。

segments.text: Of course, many pictures are not about anything.

translations.zh-Hans: 当然，许多画其实什么也不表现。

segments.text: They are just pretty patterns.

translations.zh-Hans: 它们只是一些好看的图案。

segments.text: We like them in the same way that we like pretty curtain material.

translations.zh-Hans: 我们喜欢它们，就像喜欢漂亮的窗帘布一样。

segments.text: I think that young children often appreciate modern pictures better than anyone else.

translations.zh-Hans: 我认为小孩子往往比任何人都更能欣赏现代绘画。

segments.text: They notice more.

translations.zh-Hans: 他们观察到的东西更多。

segments.text: My sister is only seven, but she always tells me whether my pictures are good or not.

translations.zh-Hans: 我妹妹只有7岁，但她总能说出我的画是好还是不好。

segments.text: She came into my room yesterday.

translations.zh-Hans: 昨天她走进我的房间。

segments.text: What are you doing?

translations.zh-Hans: “你在做什么？”

segments.text: She asked.

translations.zh-Hans: 她问。

segments.text: I'm hanging this picture on the wall.

translations.zh-Hans: “我正把这幅画挂到墙上。”

segments.text: I answered, it's a new one.

translations.zh-Hans: 我回答，“这是幅新画。

segments.text: Do you like it?

translations.zh-Hans: 你喜欢吗？”

segments.text: She looked at it critically for a moment.

translations.zh-Hans: 她挑剔地看了一会儿。

segments.text: It's all right, she said, but isn't it upside down?

translations.zh-Hans: “还可以，”她说，“不过它不是挂倒了吗？”

segments.text: I looked at it again.

translations.zh-Hans: 我又看了看。

segments.text: She was right.

translations.zh-Hans: 她说得对。

segments.text: It was.

translations.zh-Hans: 它的确挂倒了。
